title: Expression and Purification of Protein
author: Yuan Yao
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qaadsae

steps.title: Incubate BW25113/pRstA-GFP cells in 50 ml...
steps.instruction: Incubate BW25113/pRstA-GFP cells in 50 ml LB medium with chloromycetin (100 mg/ml), and expression was induced by adding IPTG (final concentration of 1.0 mM).

steps.title: Harvest by centrifugation, the cells were...
steps.instruction: Harvest by centrifugation, the cells were resuspended in 12 ml Lysis/Equilibration buffer including 120 μl lysozyme (10 mg/ml),

steps.title: Place on ice for 30 min,...
steps.instruction: Place on ice for 30 min, and then extracted by sonication method.

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to new 1.5 ml epp tube.

steps.title: Incubate with His-Select Ni-NTA Agarose (Thermo...
steps.instruction: Incubate with His-Select Ni-NTA Agarose (Thermo Fisher Scientific, USA) over night at 4°C.

steps.title: The next day, the supernatant was...
steps.instruction: The next day, the supernatant was loaded onto Ni-NTA affinity resin (Qigen, Germany).

steps.title: Proteins were examined for purity by...
steps.instruction: Proteins were examined for purity by SDS-PAGE at 200 V for 45 min. Stain gel with extant blue for 15 min.

steps.title: The pure protein were pooled and dialyzed
steps.instruction: The pure protein were pooled and dialyzed.

steps.title: The extraction of proteins was analyzed...
steps.instruction: The extraction of proteins was analyzed by BCA protein concentration quantitative method.
